## What would this audit cover?

## Standards it maps to

<!-- e.g. OWASP, WCAG, CIS, RFCs, GDPR — what recognized standards back the findings? -->

## Profile / applicability

<!-- Which projects need it? When is it "not applicable"? -->

## House-structure checklist

- [ ] Mission + Universality header
- [ ] Operating principles (evidence-bound, cite-the-standard, severity-earned, adversarial, …)
- [ ] P0–P3 severity scale + effort + priority score
- [ ] Phase 0 recon → 1 parallel specialists → 2 dedupe → 3 adversarial verify → 4 benchmark → 5 synthesis
- [ ] Shared finding schema (JSON) + Definition of Done
- [ ] Mandatory issue output per `ISSUE-OUTPUT-STANDARD.md`
